pageDesc: Subtitle + optional video → per-line TTS → timeline alignment → export
emptyStateHint: Pick a subtitle file to start dubbing. Add a video to replace/mix its audio track and preview the result.
emptyCueList: Cue list appears here after loading a subtitle
noEngineHint: No engine available: download a local dubbing model or configure an online provider in TTS Services
edgeUnstableHint: Edge free channel is a reverse-engineered API with no availability guarantee. Switch to a local model or an OpenAI-compatible provider if it breaks.
localConcurrencyHint: Each parallel lane keeps an extra model in memory (~0.5GB regular, ~1.5GB clone models); reclaimed automatically after the batch
cloneQualityHint: High quality roughly doubles synthesis time, noticeable for batch dubbing
backgroundDuck: Duck original track (auto lower during speech)
outputLockedHint: No video provided (or the media is audio-only), so only audio export is available
overlapModeHint: {{count}} line(s) overlap in time: defer plays them in order; multi-track mix keeps the original timeline and mixes them at export
charBillingCloud: Cloud TTS bills per character; previews and per-line regeneration cost extra
charBillingAzure: Azure billing includes SSML markup characters, slightly above this count
charBillingEleven: ElevenLabs bills Chinese at ~3 characters per character (byte-based)
charBillingVolc: Doubao character tier ~¥1.3 per 1K chars, free quota for new users
exportSkipped: {{count}} line(s) without synthesis were skipped (kept silent)
overlongExportHint: {{count}} overlong line(s) unresolved: export will truncate or shift them per the overlong handling setting. Review them first if possible.
overlapHint: {{count}} line(s) overlap in time (auto deferred in order)
